text:
General Rope Safety
Shibari Study describes this free course as focusing on bondage safety and the risks associated with shibari, including different rope types, anatomy, and communication. The page catalogs related topics including consent and negotiation, cutting tools, nerves, fainting, pain and personal risk profiles, psychological considerations, and trauma-release exercises. The site describes its instruction as fully clothed, consent-driven adult education focused on technique, communication, connection, and safe practice.
title: Free General Rope Safety Course
